signals.headline: **US Central Command confirms full implementation of Iranian ports blockade**, escalating tensions as Iran retains de fa
signals.raw: **US Central Command confirms full implementation of Iranian ports blockade**, escalating tensions as Iran retains de facto Strait of Hormuz control (choking 20% global oil); ceasefire remains "fragile" with Iranian accusations of US "maximalism."[1][2][3]

Will 80 ships transit the Strait of Hormuz on any day by April 30?

signals.headline: **Second round of US-Iran ceasefire talks nears** (possibly hosted by Pakistan in coming days), following inconclusive f
signals.raw: **Second round of US-Iran ceasefire talks nears** (possibly hosted by Pakistan in coming days), following inconclusive first round over nuclear commitments and Hormuz; no deal or breakthrough confirmed, with ceasefire designed to fail per some analysts due to irreconcilable red lines.[2][3]
matched_markets: Will the US x Iran ceasefire be extended by April 21, 2026?
